titleStmt.title: SII 24.289: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 289. (A.R. No. 35 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of Tuṟaiyūr, a village in Mēlaimuṟi of Maḻai-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu by Goppaṇaṅgaḷ towards repairs, flower gardens and a choultry at the Pallavarāyar-maṭha, under the orders from Chikka Uḍaiyar i.e., Kampaṇa, son of Bukka I. The record is dated in Śaka 1297, Rākshasa, Pushya (Tai 15) ba. 3, Thursday which correspond regularly to A.D. 1376, January 10, Thursday, ·67.; nakshatra Maghā ·12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mat mahāmaṇḍaleśvarat Arirāya vipāṭaṉ bhāṣaikkuttappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ
inturāya suratrāṇaṉ catussamudrādhipati śrīvīrabukkaṇa Uṭaiyar pṛthu virājyam paṇṇiya
ruḷāniṉṟa cagāptam 1000 2 100 9 10ēl mel cellāniṉṟa rākṣasavarṣam puṣyabahuḷa tritiyai gu5
vāram taimāsam 10 5 n tiyati śrīmathīcikka Uṭaiyār nirupappaṭikku śrīmathu goppaṇaṅkaḷ perumāḷ
śrīraṅganātaṉukku kuṭutta śāsanam śrīraṅgattil perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthaṉ koyilil naṭattukiṟa
tiruppaṇikkum tirunan=tavaṉattukkum pallavarāyar maṭattil naṭakkiṟa satrattukkum naṭakkum tatsam(va)
vatsaram mutalu ka tta prākku muṉṉāḷ kampaṇṇa Uṭaiyar nāḷil naṭanta Ūrāy Ūraṭa
ṅkalum viṭṭa vaṭakarai Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu maḻaināṭu melai muṟiyal tuṟaiyūr Ūr Oṉṟu
kku prākku taḷa pramāṇappaṭi poṉ 9[7 10] Ippoṉ toḷāyirattu Eḻupatukkum Ivvūr nāṉkellai
kku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey māvaṭai puṉpayir paṭṭaṭai Āyam cekkuk kaṭamai Uṭpaṭṭa pala Upāti
Uṭpaṭa sarvamānyamāka Inta dharmmattukku cantrātittavaraiyum cella Inta tharmmattukku virotam paṇṇiṉavar
Uṇṭākil gaṅkaikkaraiyilum setuviṉ karaiyilum kayilaiyaik koṉṟār paṇṇiṉa pāpamum
mātāpitākkaḷai koṉṟār paṇṇiṉa pāpamum Irupattoru prakāram pitṛkkaḷ narakattil kiṭan
paṇṇiṉa pāpamum Uṇ kaṭavatākavum Immariyātaikku Ivvūr sarvvamānyamāka Inta dharmma
candrātittavaraiyum cella Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭa Ippaṭikku Ivai goppaṇṇaṅkaḷ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
